url.label: Flair URL
url.help: Base URL for the Flair server

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Agent identifier for memory namespacing. Auto-detected from OpenClaw agent name if omitted.

keyPath.label: Private Key Path
keyPath.help: Path to Ed25519 private key for Flair auth (generated by `flair agent add`)

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context at session start

autoCaptureMaxPerSession.label: Auto-Capture Max Per Session
autoCaptureMaxPerSession.help: Cap on trigger-based auto-captures per session (default 3). For a long-lived persistent session, this is the cap for the session's whole lifetime, not per calendar day.
